overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from a cyberpunk-style setting, showing a group of characters gathered around a campfire in a desert wasteland at night. Futuristic illuminated towers rise in the distant background while windmill structures and Joshua trees dot the landscape, creating a contrast between rustic survival and high-tech civilization.

segments.scene_description: A static shot captures a group of characters gathered around a blazing campfire in an open desert wasteland at night. The warm firelight illuminates the social circle of sitting and standing figures, while distinctive Joshua trees and futuristic windmill structures dot the landscape. In the distance, illuminated skyscrapers pierce the night sky, creating a stark contrast between the rustic camp and the high-tech city beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static, atmospheric view of a rustic survival camp set against the backdrop of a distant, high-tech metropolis. It begins with a focus on a group of characters gathered around a blazing campfire, where the warm, flickering light illuminates the figures sitting and standing in a social circle. As the eye wanders outward from the fire, the surrounding desert wasteland reveals distinctive Joshua trees and futuristic windmill structures scattered across the dark terrain. The scene finally expands toward the horizon, where illuminated skyscrapers pierce the night sky to create a stark contrast between the primitive camp and the glowing city beyond.
